command: Write-Host '=== TOP LEVEL ===' ; Get-ChildItem -Path "$env:USERPROFILE\Desktop\projects" | Select-Object Name, PSIsContainer, Length | Format-Table -AutoSize ; Write-Host '=== FONT FILES ===' ; Get-ChildItem -Path "$env:USERPROFILE\Desktop\projects" -Recurse -Include *.ttf,*.otf,*.woff,*.woff2 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, FullName, Length | Format-Table -AutoSize ; Write-Host '=== ARABIC RELATED ===' ; Get-ChildItem -Path "$env:USERPROFILE\Desktop\projects" -Recurse -Include *arab*,*cairo*,*tajawal*,*noto*,*font* -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.FullName -notmatch 'venv|node_modules|__pycache__|.git' } | Select-Object Name, FullName | Format-Table -AutoSize
description: البحث عن ملفات الخطوط العربية في مجلد projects وعرض بنية المجلد
